title: The War at Marineford Begins

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Damn it all!!! Those damned Shichibukai ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: That's how you kill him properly!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuff- Fuffu...!!! Oh, this is great, Fuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffuffu!!!
